name: Gupshup Conversational Messaging API
what_it_does: Conversational messaging platform with API for WhatsApp Business, SMS, RCS, and chatbot deployment. Strong in India and emerging markets with pre-approved WhatsApp Business API access.
use_cases: Sending WhatsApp template and session messages for customer notifications via API
Building WhatsApp chatbots for automated customer support in emerging markets
OTP delivery via SMS and WhatsApp for authentication flows
Broadcast campaigns to customer segments via WhatsApp Business API
Omnichannel messaging orchestration across SMS, WhatsApp, and RCS from single API
not_for: Western markets where Twilio or Vonage have broader carrier coverage
High-volume SMS in North America (Gupshup's strength is emerging markets/WhatsApp)
Complex conversational AI requiring LLM integration — basic chatbot builder only
best_when: An agent communicates with customers in India, Southeast Asia, or Latin America via WhatsApp or SMS with regulatory compliance for those markets.
avoid_when: Your primary market is North America or Europe — Twilio or Vonage offer better coverage.

auth.notes: API key from Gupshup dashboard. API key passed in request headers or body depending on endpoint. Separate credentials for sandbox and production environments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free sandbox for testing; limited credits on signup
pricing.paid_tiers: WhatsApp messaging from ~$0.005-0.05/message; SMS rates vary by country
pricing.notes: Pay-per-message pricing. WhatsApp Business API costs include Meta conversation fees plus Gupshup markup. Strong pricing for India market. Enterprise plans available.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by channel and plan; WhatsApp: per Meta's rate limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: API documentation varies in quality by channel. WhatsApp API is better documented than SMS. Error responses include codes but messages can be generic. Sandbox environment available for testing.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Message sending is not inherently idempotent — retries can cause duplicate messages. Message ID tracking required for deduplication.
known_agent_gotchas: WhatsApp template messages require Meta pre-approval — can take 24-48 hours
Different endpoints for different channels (SMS vs WhatsApp vs RCS) — not unified
India DLT registration required for SMS — additional compliance step for Indian market
Session messages allowed only within 24-hour WhatsApp window — templates for proactive outreach

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR compliant. TRAI regulatory compliance for India. TLS enforced. Single API key model limits scope granularity. WhatsApp Business API security follows Meta's standards.
